response: Neighborhood enrichment analysis requires cell type annotations in slice 0, but this slice currently has no celltype annotations. Since this is spot-level data, you'll need to either: (1) Perform cell type deconvolution to estimate cell type proportions in each spot, or (2) Annotate spots with dominant cell types using a reference dataset. Please first run a cell type annotation or deconvolution analysis on slice 0, then retry the neighborhood enrichment analysis.
query_text: Test whether cell types co-localize spatially in this tissue.
answer: Neighborhood enrichment analysis requires cell type annotations in slice 0, but this slice currently has no celltype annotations. Since this is spot-level data, you'll need to either: (1) Perform cell type deconvolution to estimate cell type proportions in each spot, or (2) Annotate spots with dominant cell types using a reference dataset. Please first run a cell type annotation or deconvolution analysis on slice 0, then retry the neighborhood enrichment analysis.
